Skill: LLM System Blueprint
Description: Projetar sistemas of LLM with architecture modular of agents, skills, tools, memory, workflows, evaluators, policies and observability, including integration via MCP with governance and segurança operacional. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Transformar uso of LLM in plataforma with previsibilidade operacional.  ## Rules
Triggers: llm architecture, multi-agent system, mcp, ai governance, ai platform blueprint
Stack: Agentic LLM Platform; N/A; N/A; N/A; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Define roles of agents and contracts of responsibility.
- 2. Model skills with criteria of success and limits of execution.
- 3. Integrate tools via MCP with minimum scope and auditability.
- 4. Structure memory, workflows, evaluators and policies.
- 5. Enable observability and production checklist.
Output Contract:
- Blueprint architecturel by camadas.
- Minimum operating contracts.
- Plan of governance and security.
- Checklist of readiness for production.
